ticket.subject: Request for API Integration Details – Professional Couriers
ticket.raw_subject: Request for API Integration Details – Professional Couriers
ticket.description:
Hi
Greetings of the day


We are currently working with PluginHive to integrate Professional Couriers with their PH Multi-Carrier Shipping Label application.

To proceed with the integration, PluginHive has requested the following details from your side:

1. API Documentation
2. Sandbox/Test Credentials (if available)
3. Technical or Integration-related Information
4. Contact Details of the Concerned Technical/Support Representative (Email ID and Phone Number)

Kindly share the above details at your earliest convenience so that the integration process can move forward smoothly.

If there is a dedicated account manager or technical contact for API integrations, please introduce us to the concerned person for further coordination.


Thanks for your continued support.

Regards,

Instore
Online Team

926 926 1919
044 4950 8783

comments.body:
🤖 Auto-generated draft — customer reply (probation mode)
Product: shopify-mcsl | Signal: form_field | Confidence: HIGH | Context: 3 message(s)
─────────────────────────────────────────────

Hello Rahmath,

Thank you for sharing the API documentation and test credentials. We have received the attached files (API Manual - Delivery Push and API Manual Demo) along with the sandbox details.

Our technical team will review the documentation and test credentials and reach out if any clarifications are needed. All further coordination will be handled through our main integration ticket to ensure nothing falls through.

We appreciate your prompt response and look forward to getting this integration underway.

Thanks & Regards,
Team PluginHive

⚡ This response was generated automatically by PluginHive AI Support. A team member will follow up if you need further assistance.

comments.body:
Hello Rahmathullah,

Good day!

I am Keerthi, Customer Success Manager at PluginHive.

Instore team is currently evaluating our **PH Multi-Carrier Shipping Label** app and has expressed interest in integrating Professional Couriers.

Thank you for sharing the API documentation and test credentials. We will share these details with our technical team for review and feasibility assessment.

Should we have any questions or require any additional information during the evaluation process, we will get in touch with you.

Thank you for your support and cooperation.

Best regards,
Keerthi
Customer Success Manager
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Rahmathullah,
 
Good day!
 
I am Keerthi, Customer Success Manager at PluginHive.
 
Instore team is currently evaluating our PH Multi-Carrier Shipping Label app and has expressed interest in integrating Professional Couriers.
 
Thank you for sharing the API documentation and test credentials. We will share these details with our technical team for review and feasibility assessment.
 
Should we have any questions or require any additional information during the evaluation process, we will get in touch with you.
 
Thank you for your support and cooperation.
 
Best regards,
Keerthi
Customer Success Manager
PluginHive

L3: **Carrier Integration Request - Professional Couriers.** Shared the API Docs, Tech contact and Test Creds in thread, please check the feasibility. @Vimal FYI

**App:** MCSL (Pre-sale)
**Carriers:** BlueDart, IndiaPost, DTDC and Professional Couriers (they'll connect us with DTDC as well)
**Labels:** Expected to process 4,500/month
**Proposed plan:** $49/month
**URL:** https://instore.co.in/
**Location:** Chennai based store


**Test Creds:**
url       :             www.tpcglobe.com
login id :            MAAROY0001
pwssword :       TTS24

**Tech Contact Details**
**Name: ** A. Mohamed Rahmathullah
**Email ID:** rahmath@tpcmaa.in
**Phone No.:** +91 9884055419
